specs.title: cp-000: While saving the button shows text-only loading feedback with no spinner icon
cp-001: Successful profile saves render the inline message Profile saved successfully ne
cp-002: Failed profile saves render the inline message Failed to save profile Please try
cp-003: Save successerror feedback is inline text not a toast or modal
cp-004: Save messages auto-clear after 3 seconds through showSaveMessage
cp-005: Profile save payload includes full_name specialty country bio research_interests
cp-006: Profile save payload does not include email plan preferred_language or default_c
cp-007: Successful profile saves update the local user state so the account summary refl
cp-008: Failed profile saves leave the current form field values intact for retry
cp-009: Billing tab main heading reads Plans Billing
cp-010: Current plan heading is rendered as Capitalized plan Plan
cp-011: Free plan pricing renders as the standalone text Free
cp-012: Basic plan pricing renders 1000 with month in muted text
cp-013: Pro plan pricing renders 2500 with month in muted text
cp-014: Token quota text uses toLocaleStringen-IN formatting for the numeric limit
cp-015: ACTIVE badge is always shown in the current plan card
cp-016: Manage Plan button has no disabled or loading state in the current page componen
cp-017: Payment Method section always shows the hard-coded card text Visa 4242
cp-018: Razorpay Secure helper text is rendered under the card details
cp-019: Update button has no disabled or loading state in the current page component
cp-020: Invoice History heading renders directly above the DataTable
cp-021: Invoice table actions header cell is intentionally blank
cp-022: Every invoice row renders a Download button with a DownloadSimple icon and text
cp-023: Invoice table container uses horizontal overflow handling and a rounded bordered
cp-024: Usage tab main heading reads Usage Tracking
cp-025: AI Tokens progress row shows the label on the left and used max text on the righ
cp-026: AI Tokens progress fill uses var--brand as its bar color
cp-027: Finite progress bars clamp their fill width to 100 maximum
cp-028: Deep Searches row shows value Unlimited instead of value max
cp-029: Deep Searches fill width is fixed to 30 when max 0
cp-030: Deep Searches helper text reads Fair use policy applies for unlimited searches
cp-031: Plagiarism Checks progress fill uses f59e0b
cp-032: This Month at a Glance heading renders above the 2x2 usage summary grid
cp-033: Summary cards render label text a bold primary value and a smaller helper line a
cp-034: Exports summary falls back to 0 when usageStatsexports_used is nullish
